caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or interview titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual, indoor environment, possibly a clothing store or a studio with a retail section, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged and animated, smiling and speaking into the microphone, suggesting an interactive and lively conversation. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, conducive to a friendly discussion or interview.
